title: Dashboard
subtitle: See your balance sheet, current savings capacity, and which plans are closest to the finish line.
addSituationFirst: Add a situation first so FinOpt can turn what you can invest, your assets, and goals into a plan.
nextStepWithSituation: Create or run a plan to see which goals are already within reach.
nextStepNoSituation: Create your first situation to start building goal-based plans.

stats.netWorthEmpty: Add a situation to start tracking your balance sheet.
stats.investingPowerDetail: From how much you invest each month in your primary situation.
stats.investingPowerEmpty: You haven't set how much you invest yet.

portfolio.title: Portfolio snapshot
portfolio.subtitle: Use your latest saved situation as the baseline for future plans.
portfolio.basedOn: These metrics are based on your primary situation, <name>{{name}}</name>.
portfolio.emptyMessage: Create a situation with what you can invest and account balances to unlock a financial baseline.

health.milestoneClosest: {{name}} is currently the closest plan with a visible result.
health.milestoneEmpty: Run a plan to surface a likely time horizon here.

recent.title: Recent results and runs
recent.subtitle: Review the latest optimizer activity and remove runs you no longer need.
recent.empty: No runs yet. Create a plan and launch a calculation to start seeing results here.
recent.confirmDeleteResult: Delete this result? This action cannot be undone.
recent.confirmDeleteRun: Delete this run? This action cannot be undone.

prioritySummary.needsChanges: This plan is currently outside reach and likely needs adjusted contributions, goals, or timing.
prioritySummary.tightHorizon: It may work in about {{horizon}}, but the margin is still tight.
prioritySummary.tight: This plan may work, but it still has little room for error.
prioritySummary.running: This is the most recent active run and should give you fresh guidance soon.
prioritySummary.completed: The latest run finished, but the saved result summary is not available yet.
prioritySummary.onTrackHorizon: {{met}}/{{total}} goals are currently satisfied with an estimated horizon of {{horizon}}.
prioritySummary.onTrack: This completed plan currently looks achievable.
prioritySummary.failed: The last calculation failed, so this plan is the best candidate to revisit next.
prioritySummary.default: Run this plan to surface a realistic timeline.

runSummary.running: FinOpt is simulating paths and optimizing allocations for this plan.
runSummary.queued: This run is waiting to start.
runSummary.completed: The run finished, but its saved result summary is not available here yet.
runSummary.failed: This run did not finish. Review the inputs and try again.
runSummary.needsChanges: The current inputs are not enough to reach every goal.
runSummary.tightHorizon: Goals are close, but the plan still looks tight over {{horizon}}.
runSummary.tight: Goals are close, but this plan still has little margin.
runSummary.onTrackHorizon: All goals are currently achievable in about {{horizon}}.

toast.deletedDetail: The run and its saved result were removed from your dashboard.

milestone.subtitle: This is how close you are to reaching a plan's goals.
